'''shodhachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yclept|yclept]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-dh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yclept|yclept]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shodhachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shodhachithi|shodhachithi]] || [[word:shodhachiji|shodhachiji]] || [[word:shodhachishi|shodhachishi]] || [[word:shodhachiki|shodhachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shodhachuthuthu|shodhachuthuthu]] || [[word:shodhachujuju|shodhachujuju]] || [[word:shodhachushushu|shodhachushushu]] || [[word:shodhachukuku|shodhachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shodhachuthu|shodhachuthu]] || [[word:shodhachuju|shodhachuju]] || [[word:shodhachushu|shodhachushu]] || [[word:shodhachuku|shodhachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shodhachufthuf|shodhachufthuf]] || [[word:shodhachufjuf|shodhachufjuf]] || [[word:shodhachufshuf|shodhachufshuf]] || [[word:shodhachufkuf|shodhachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shodhachethe|shodhachethe]] || [[word:shodhacheje|shodhacheje]] || [[word:shodhacheshe|shodhacheshe]] || [[word:shodhacheke|shodhacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shodhachothotho|shodhachothotho]] || [[word:shodhachojojo|shodhachojojo]] || [[word:shodhachoshosho|shodhachoshosho]] || [[word:shodhachokoko|shodhachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shodhachotho|shodhachotho]] || [[word:shodhachojo|shodhachojo]] || [[word:shodhachosho|shodhachosho]] || [[word:shodhachoko|shodhachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shodhachofthof|shodhachofthof]] || [[word:shodhachofjof|shodhachofjof]] || [[word:shodhachofshof|shodhachofshof]] || [[word:shodhachofkof|shodhachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shodhachĂŻfthĂŻf|shodhachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhachĂŻfjĂŻf|shodhachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhachĂŻfshĂŻf|shodhachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhachĂŻfkĂŻf|shodhachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shodhachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|shodhachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|shodhachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|shodhachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|shodhachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shodhachĂŻfthĂŻf|shodhachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhachĂŻfjĂŻf|shodhachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhachĂŻfshĂŻf|shodhachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhachĂŻfkĂŻf|shodhachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shodhachĂŻfthĂŻf|shodhachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhachĂŻfjĂŻf|shodhachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhachĂŻfshĂŻf|shodhachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhachĂŻfkĂŻf|shodhachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shodhachĂŠthĂŠ|shodhachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:shodhachĂŠjĂŠ|shodhachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:shodhachĂŠshĂŠ|shodhachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:shodhachĂŠkĂŠ|shodhachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shodhachathatha|shodhachathatha]] || [[word:shodhachajaja|shodhachajaja]] || [[word:shodhachashasha|shodhachashasha]] || [[word:shodhachakaka|shodhachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shodhachatha|shodhachatha]] || [[word:shodhachaja|shodhachaja]] || [[word:shodhachasha|shodhachasha]] || [[word:shodhachaka|shodhachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shodhachafthaf|shodhachafthaf]] || [[word:shodhachafjaf|shodhachafjaf]] || [[word:shodhachafshaf|shodhachafshaf]] || [[word:shodhachafkaf|shodhachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shodhachasha|shodhachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shodhachshĂ«sha|shodhachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shodhachrosha|shodhachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shodhachmusha|shodhachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shodhachyasha|shodhachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshodhachnkshĂ«sha|goshodhachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshodhachnkrosha|goshodhachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshodhachnkmusha|goshodhachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshodhachnkyasha|goshodhachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shodhadhachasha|shodhadhachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shodhadhachshĂ«sha|shodhadhachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shodhadhachrosha|shodhadhachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shodhadhachmusha|shodhadhachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shodhadhachyasha|shodhadhachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshodhadhachnkshĂ«sha|goshodhadhachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshodhadhachnkrosha|goshodhadhachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshodhadhachnkmusha|goshodhadhachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshodhadhachnkyasha|goshodhadhachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:shedhĂŠchasha|shedhĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shedhĂŠchshĂ«sha|shedhĂŠchshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shedhĂŠchrosha|shedhĂŠchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shedhĂŠchmusha|shedhĂŠchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shedhĂŠchyasha|shedhĂŠchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshedhĂŠchnkshĂ«sha|goshedhĂŠchnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshedhĂŠchnkrosha|goshedhĂŠchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshedhĂŠchnkmusha|goshedhĂŠchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshedhĂŠchnkyasha|goshedhĂŠchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shodhfachasha|shodhfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shodhfachshĂ«sha|shodhfachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shodhfachrosha|shodhfachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shodhfachmusha|shodhfachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shodhfachyasha|shodhfachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshodhfachnkshĂ«sha|goshodhfachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshodhfachnkrosha|goshodhfachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshodhfachnkmusha|goshodhfachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshodhfachnkyasha|goshodhfachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
